hero.title: A calmer way to discover premium private stays in Dilijan.
hero.description: Aygoot is designed as a curated hospitality platform, not a generic listing wall. The goal is to make finding and requesting the right house feel elegant, trustworthy, and simple.

pillars.title: Curated, not crowded
pillars.description: A tighter collection means better presentation, more clarity, and stronger guest trust.

pillars.title: Nature-forward design
pillars.description: The brand language draws from wood, forest shadow, mountain light, and quiet warmth.

pillars.title: Built for real operations
pillars.description: Guests get clarity, while admins get practical tools to review requests and manage homes.
